Custom Bakery Banner Material for Indoor & Outdoor Restaurant Use

Due to the latest shipping regulations, all vinyl banners that exceed 8 feet in both directions will be folded for shipping. If you do not want your banners folded, please contact us to get a custom freight quote.

Make the most of your next bakery event with an eye-catching vinyl banner. From trade shows and in-store displays to grand openings and farmers markets, we can help you improve your visibility and make an unforgettable first impression with our professionally designed custom bakery banners.

Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver a bakery banner that you're proud to display. That's why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your vision to reality. One of the ways we do this is through strict quality checks. Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years. They're deeply familiar with the nuances of the vinyl banner industry and are dedicated to collaborating to ensure you receive a tailor-made bakery banner. If something doesn't meet our standards, our staff of in-house graphic designers will contact you to fix it immediately. Your satisfaction is our number one priority.

We offer a wide selection of custom bakery banners and signage options, including sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design options in our online designer, and you can even choose production time to ensure your bakery banner is delivered when you need it. Get started on your bakery banner today. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to our in-house customer support team.

Did we answer all your questions?

If not, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300, and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.

Looking for something more specific? We can create custom solutions for special projects, unique sizes, and larger quantity orders through a custom quote. Ideal for bakery chains, franchise locations, and grand opening events.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Bakery Banner Material for Indoor & Outdoor Restaurant Use

Six Customizable Banner Materials

Your bakery banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that pop. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your bakery banner needs to be precise, please ask your customer service representative to discuss your specific application.

13 oz Matte Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular banner material. It has a low shine and rich color gamut.

13 oz Gloss Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz gloss vinyl banner material has a high shine to it that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics to give it a high-end look.

18 oz Vinyl Banners

Our extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality.

Mesh Banners

Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim that allows a 37% airflow. Mesh banners are ideal for outdoor and windy conditions.

Fabric Banners

Made with a premium nylon/polyester blend material called Banner Soft. This fabric is ideal for indoor displays and has a low shine that produces a high-end look and feel.

Adhesive Banners

Standard Tack Vinyl: Standard tack vinyl can be used both indoors and outdoors, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained.

Extreme Tack Vinyl: Extreme Tack vinyl is white calendered vinyl material with a high tack adhesive that is specifically designed to adhere to low energy surfaces.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Bakery Banner Finishing Options for Professional Display

Vinyl Banner Finishing Options

Hems & Grommets Reinforced Hems Reinforced Corners Pole Pockets
These are a one inch fold, heat-welded hem with grommets typically added every 2–4 feet. A thick, weblike material is heat-welded to the perimeter to provide additional reinforcement. A triangular piece of vinyl is applied to improve strength and durability in the corners. A sleeve added to allow for a dowel or pole to run through for support.

Heat Welded Hems & Grommets

Hems consist of one inch of the vinyl banner material folded over and heated together to form a strong hem. We recommend hems for all bakery banners to increase durability.

You will have the following options when selecting hems and grommets:

Top and Bottom Only Hems – Standard finishing option for vinyl banners.

All Four Sides Hems – All 4 sides of the banner will be heat welded and grommeted.

Pole Pockets

Pole pockets consist of 2, 3, or 4 inches of material wrapped around the sides, top, or bottom of the banner.

  • 2" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 3/4" in diameter
  • 3" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter
  • 4" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter

By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your bakery banner.

Pole pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners.

Reinforced Corners

Reinforced corners provide extra strength and are grommeted to each corner of the banner.

Reinforced Hems

Reinforced hems are a PVC-coated webbing which increases the strength of the banner.

You cannot have reinforced hems with pole pockets.

Double-Sided Banner Finishing

We can finish double-sided banners up to 150 square feet. Larger sizes require a custom quote.

To learn more, visit our vinyl banner finishing options page.

We do not recommend wind slits in banners. For more information, visit our wind slit banners page.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Production Times & Turnaround for Custom Bakery Banners

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your bakery banner order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

1 Business Day Priority:

Timelines can be tight. That's why we offer this zippy one day turnaround option.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes may be available. Please contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts once file upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested.

2 Business Days Express:

Have an extra day, but still need your bakery banners quickly? The express option is ideal.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes may be available. Please contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts once file upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested.

3 Business Days Standard:

This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy for most custom orders.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes may be available. Please contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts once file upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested.

5 Business Days Saver:

If you're not in a rush, you can save money by choosing our 5-Day Saver option.

  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes may be available. Please contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts once file upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested.

Payment & Ordering Options for Bakery Banner Printing

Payment

All bakery banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your order is put into production. For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog.

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your bakery banner order.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Custom Bakery Banner Delivery

General Shipping Guidelines

If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your bakery banner order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders.

After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, the damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after the initial scheduled delivery.

International Shipping Notes:

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS.

Shipping Maps

Vinyl Banners & Mesh Banners

This product is produced in our Minnesota or Las Vegas facilities, whichever is more beneficial based on customer location and product specifications.

Fabric Banners

This product is made in our Minnesota facility only.

Shipping Methods

We offer the following shipping methods:

  • Standard (3–5 Business Days)
  • Three Day (3 Business Days)
  • Two Day (2 Business Days)
  • Overnight (1 Business Day)
  • UPS Overnight AM

Economy Shipping

If choosing economy shipping, please add additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.

Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5–10 days depending on destination.

Artwork Requirements for Bakery Banner Design & Printing

Artwork Guidelines

The file that prints best is .eps converted to outline. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

Artwork/Order Proofs

If you would like to double-check your bakery banner order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork and a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

Color Match Proof System

If your bakery banner project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Bakery Banners for Grand Openings & Promotions

Banners are a great way to advertise your bakery! Get a bakery banner with your business name and logo, hours, products and services you offer, or anything else you want people to know. These custom products are perfect for advertising sales and promotions you have going on, or for introducing new products and sales.

Bakery banners are an excellent way to drive traffic to indoor and outdoor baking events. Custom bakery banners can also advertise for your delicious bakery at County Fairs, kid's sporting events, parades and more! Be as creative designing your banner as you are hanging it.

We have several bakery banner design templates ready to personalize, or you can start with a blank template and make your own design. You can also upload a print-ready file or have one of our graphic designers create a banner for you.

Bakery banners are available in 13-oz. vinyl matte or glossy as well as heavy duty 18-oz. matte vinyl, fabric and mesh materials.

We are here and happy to help you with all your yummy signage needs!

Why Choose Banners.com?

Customer Service
Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

Fast Turnaround
Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your bakery banner order on your schedule.

Quality Products
Our bakery banners are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology.

Live Order Tracking
Track your bakery banner order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.

High-quality, high-resolution, and full-color bakery banners take your event to the next level. At banners.com, we offer all that and more, like quick delivery and outdoor durability. Request a quote and start your bakery banner design, today.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Bakery Banners

What materials work best for outdoor bakery banners?

For outdoor bakery banner displays, we recommend 13 oz or 18 oz vinyl materials for maximum durability. Mesh banners are ideal for windy locations as they allow 37% airflow while maintaining vibrant graphics.

How long do bakery banners last outdoors?

Vinyl bakery banners typically last 2-5 years outdoors when properly installed and maintained. The lifespan depends on weather exposure, material thickness, and finishing options selected.

Can you match specific bakery brand colors?

Yes, we offer a Color Match Proof System for color-critical bakery banner projects. This ensures your brand colors are accurately reproduced on your custom bakery banners.

What sizes are available for bakery banners?

Bakery banners are available in sizes ranging from 1'x1' up to 8'x50'. For larger custom sizes, please contact us for a custom quote.

Do you offer same-day production for bakery banners?

We offer 1-business-day priority production for bakery banners. Same-day rushes may be available - please contact customer service for emergency orders.

What finishing options work best for storefront display?

For storefront bakery banner installation, we recommend hems with grommets for easy hanging, or pole pockets for clean pole mounting. Reinforced corners add extra durability for frequent handling.
